# seerr_sonarr_quality_profile (Data Source)

Look up a Sonarr quality profile by name via /api/v3/qualityprofile.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seerr_sonarr_quality_profile" "shows" {
  url     = var.sonarr_url
  api_key = var.sonarr_api_key
  name    = "HD-1080p"
}

resource "seerr_sonarr_server" "shows" {
  url                = var.sonarr_url
  api_key            = var.sonarr_api_key
  quality_profile_id = data.seerr_sonarr_quality_profile.shows.quality_profile_id
  active_directory   = "/media/tv"
}
```

## Schema

### Required

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive)
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `base_url` (String)
- `hostname` (String)
- `port` (Number)
- `url` (String)
- `use_ssl` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `quality_profile_id` (Number)
- `response_json` (String)
- `status_code` (Number)
